description_long: This is a robust wristwatch with a black case and strap, accented by bold yellow details on the dial and side buttons. The round dial features large, luminous yellow numerals and indices, with three subdials and a date window, indicating a chronograph design. The strap appears to be made of black leather or synthetic material, stitched for durability, and fastened with a traditional buckle. The case is thick and rugged, with prominent yellow pushers and a crown on the right side, suggesting water resistance and sporty functionality. The watch face is protected by a clear, likely mineral or sapphire crystal, and the overall build is substantial, suitable for everyday urban wear. The Fossil brand logo is visible on the dial, reinforcing its identity as a fashion-forward accessory.
description: A rugged black wristwatch with bold yellow accents, featuring a chronograph dial, stitched strap, and prominent side buttons. The Fossil logo is displayed on the dial, and the watch exudes a sporty, urban style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick black case, stitched strap, and the curvature of the band.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black dial with yellow numerals, hands, subdials, and the Fossil logo.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the yellow crown and pushers, as well as the case thickness.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the strap's stitching, buckle, and the back of the watch case.
attribute_brand_logo: Fossil logo in white text, centered on the upper half of the dial.
attribute_dial_design: Chronograph style with large yellow Arabic numerals at 12, 4, and 8, yellow indices, three subdials, a date window, and luminous yellow hands. The dial is busy and sporty, with a matte black background.
attribute_strap_type: Black leather or synthetic strap with visible stitching and a traditional buckle.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three hands (hour, minute, second), three subdials for chronograph functions, a date window, and luminous elements for visibility.
